label: # NOTE (long-term): replace these ois_m2m rows with serial (1m) and quarterly (3m)
# SOFR futures once you are ready to handle the convexity adjustment. Serial futures
# (spec="usd_stir1") cover each monthly period; quarterly futures (spec="usd_stir")
# cover Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec IMM dates. Each future needs a convexity adjustment (~0.5bp
# per year of duration squared) subtracted from the futures rate before passing as `s`.
# --- LONG END: outright swaps and composites ---
# node_tenor: optional override for which curve node this instrument calibrates.
# Required when the auto-derived node date would collide with another instrument.
# Rule for Spread: ref1 = anchor leg (already in curve)
#   If ref2 is ALSO an outright swap target
# Rule for Fly: ref2 (belly) is always the new node; node_tenor not needed.
